projects.title: SolEngine
projects.summary: A C++20 game engine with a pure Vulkan renderer — volk, VMA, glslang SPIR-V, forward PBR, PCF shadows, HDR/bloom, Lua scripting, Jolt physics, EnTT.

projects.title: Developer Ecosystem
projects.summary: A unified, customizable developer hub built with Rust, .NET and CEF.
